questions.question: Explain the difference between bivariate and multivariate data. Provide an example of each.
questions.hint: Use diagrams and formulas to support your explanation.

questions.question: State the formula for calculating the correlation coefficient. Explain its significance in understanding the relationship between two continuous variables.
questions.hint: Use the formula: r = Σ[(xi - x̄)(yi - ȳ)] / sqrt[Σ(xi - x̄)² * Σ(yi - ȳ)²]

questions.question: What is the purpose of dimensionality reduction techniques such as PCA? Explain how it can be applied in real-world scenarios.
questions.hint: Provide examples of datasets that can benefit from dimensionality reduction and discuss the trade-offs involved.
